metadata.description: Durable planning authority for goals, roadmaps, plans, todos, issues, review points, work-point graphs, project-run leases, validation, and projection rendering.
metadata.summary: Create and inspect durable planning records over Elegy's dedicated planning CLI.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Create Goal
capabilities.description: Create a durable goal with explicit acceptance and rejection criteria.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID required for machine-safe goal authoring.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional goal status: draft, proposed, active, validated, invalidated, superseded, or abandoned.

output.description: Created goal record and validation state.

capabilities.name: Show Goal
capabilities.description: Show one durable goal including linked planning context and validation state.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Goal view with linked roadmaps and validation state.

capabilities.name: Create Roadmap
capabilities.description: Create a roadmap linked to an existing goal.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID required for machine-safe roadmap authoring.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional roadmap status: draft, proposed, active, blocked, completed, cancelled, or invalidated.

output.description: Created roadmap record and validation state.

capabilities.name: Add Work Point
capabilities.description: Attach a work point to a roadmap, optionally under one roadmap section.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional work point status: draft, proposed, active, blocked, completed, cancelled, or invalidated.

parameters.name: dependency_ids
parameters.description: Optional repeated dependency work point identifiers.

parameters.name: validation_expectations
parameters.description: Optional repeated validation expectations for the work point.

parameters.name: effort_tier
parameters.description: Optional work point effort tier: fast, balanced, or deep.

output.description: Created work point record and refreshed roadmap validation state.

capabilities.name: Show Roadmap
capabilities.description: Show one roadmap with sections, work points, attached findings, and validation state.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Roadmap view with sections, work points, issues, review points, and validation state.

capabilities.name: Create Plan
capabilities.description: Create a plan linked to one goal and one roadmap.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID required for machine-safe plan authoring.

parameters.name: targeted_work_point_ids
parameters.description: Optional repeated targeted work point identifiers.

parameters.name: effort_tier
parameters.description: Optional plan effort tier: fast, balanced, or deep.

parameters.name: routing_hint
parameters.description: Optional routing hint for assigning plan execution lanes.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional plan status: draft, proposed, active, blocked, completed, cancelled, or invalidated.

output.description: Created plan record and validation state.

capabilities.name: Show Plan
capabilities.description: Show one plan with linked work points, todos, and validation state.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Plan view with targeted work points, todos, issues, review points, and validation state.

capabilities.name: Create Todo
capabilities.description: Create a durable todo, optionally linked to a plan, a work point, or both.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional todo status: pending, in-progress, blocked, completed, or cancelled.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Optional todo priority: low, medium, high, or urgent.

parameters.name: effort_tier
parameters.description: Optional todo effort tier: fast, balanced, or deep.

output.description: Created todo record and refreshed validation state for linked entities.

capabilities.name: Record Issue
capabilities.description: Record a durable planning issue, optionally attached to another planning entity.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID required for machine-safe issue recording.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional issue status: open, blocked, resolved, or reopened.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Optional issue severity: low, medium, high, or critical.

parameters.name: related_entity_type
parameters.description: Optional related entity type: goal, roadmap, roadmap-section, work-point, plan, todo, issue, or review-point.

output.description: Created issue record and refreshed validation state for linked entities.

capabilities.name: Record Review Point
capabilities.description: Attach a review point to an existing planning entity.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Attached entity type: goal, roadmap, roadmap-section, work-point, plan, todo, issue, or review-point.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional review point status: open, resolved, or accepted-risk.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Optional review point severity: low, medium, high, or critical.

output.description: Created attached review point and refreshed validation state.

capabilities.name: Validate Planning
capabilities.description: Run full deterministic planning validation over the current database.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Validation report spanning all planning entities and findings.

capabilities.name: Planning Health
capabilities.description: Show planning database health and record counts.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Planning health report with counts and schema state.

capabilities.name: Render Projection
capabilities.description: Render a non-authoritative markdown or JSON projection for one planning entity.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Entity type to render: goal, roadmap, plan, or issue.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Destination path for the rendered projection.

output.description: Projection render metadata including entity identity, format, and output path.

capabilities.name: List Scopes
capabilities.description: List known planning scopes.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Scope list envelope.

capabilities.name: Create Scope
capabilities.description: Create a scope record for scoped planning state.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

output.description: Created scope record.

capabilities.name: Revise Plan
capabilities.description: Revise assumptions, stop conditions, validation steps, targeted work points, and tags for an existing plan.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

parameters.name: targeted_work_point_ids
parameters.description: Optional repeated targeted work point identifiers.

parameters.name: effort_tier
parameters.description: Optional plan effort tier: fast, balanced, or deep.

parameters.name: routing_hint
parameters.description: Optional routing hint for assigning plan execution lanes.

parameters.name: clear_routing_hint
parameters.description: When true, explicitly clears any existing routing hint.

parameters.name: clear_file_scopes
parameters.description: When true, explicitly clears all file scopes for the plan.

output.description: Revised plan record and validation.

capabilities.name: Update Todo Status
capabilities.description: Update todo status with optional completion evidence references.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated todo record and validation.

capabilities.name: Show Scope
capabilities.description: Show one scope record.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Scope record.

capabilities.name: List Goals
capabilities.description: List goals in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Goal list envelope.

capabilities.name: Update Goal Status
capabilities.description: Transition goal lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated goal record and validation.

capabilities.name: List Roadmaps
capabilities.description: List roadmaps in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Roadmap list envelope.

capabilities.name: Update Roadmap Status
capabilities.description: Transition roadmap lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated roadmap record and validation.

capabilities.name: List Work Points
capabilities.description: List work points in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Work point list envelope.

capabilities.name: Show Work Point
capabilities.description: Show one work point.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Work point view.

capabilities.name: Update Work Point Status
capabilities.description: Transition work point lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated work point record and validation.

capabilities.name: List Plans
capabilities.description: List plans in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Plan list envelope.

capabilities.name: Update Plan Status
capabilities.description: Transition plan lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated plan record and validation.

capabilities.name: List Todos
capabilities.description: List todos in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Todo list envelope.

capabilities.name: List Issues
capabilities.description: List issues in one scope.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Issue list envelope.

capabilities.name: Update Issue Status
capabilities.description: Transition issue lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated issue record and validation.

capabilities.name: Update Review Point Status
capabilities.description: Transition review point lifecycle status.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Updated review point record and validation.

capabilities.name: List Planning Events
capabilities.description: List planning events in append order.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

output.description: Planning events envelope.

capabilities.name: Export Projection
capabilities.description: Export a non-authoritative markdown or JSON projection for one planning entity.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Optional SQLite database path for planning state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for mutation event lineage. If omitted, the global --correlation-id or active session is used.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Entity type to export: goal, roadmap, plan, or issue.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Destination path for the exported projection.

output.description: Projection export metadata including entity identity, format, and output path.

capabilities.name: Record Insight
capabilities.description: Record a reasoning insight attached to any planning entity (design-decision, edge-case, optimization, constraint, assumption, risk, context).

parameters.name: insight_type
parameters.description: Type: design-decision, edge-case, optimization, constraint, assumption, risk, or context.

parameters.name: parent_entity_type
parameters.description: Parent entity type: goal, roadmap, plan, todo, issue, etc.

output.description: Created insight record with validation findings.

capabilities.name: Entity Context Bundle
capabilities.description: Load a full context bundle for an entity: entity data, parent summary, children, insights, related insights, tags, validation, and token estimate.

output.description: Context bundle with entity, related data, insights, tags, validation, and token estimate.

capabilities.name: Session Context Bundle
capabilities.description: Load all entities and insights touched in the current correlation session.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID to load session for.

output.description: Session context with entities touched, insights recorded, validation summary, and token estimate.

capabilities.name: List Tags
capabilities.description: List all in-use tags with entity counts, optionally filtered by entity type.

output.description: List of tags with entity counts.

capabilities.name: Extended Search
capabilities.description: Search planning entities with tag and full-text search filters.

output.description: Search results with entity summaries.

capabilities.name: Claim Project Run
capabilities.description: Claim a durable execution lease on a work point, scoping it to a goal, roadmap, repo, branch, worktree, session, and profile.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Claimed project run record with status=claimed and empty evidence.

capabilities.name: Activate Project Run
capabilities.description: Transition a claimed project run to active. The only path from claimed to active.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

output.description: Activated project run record with status=active.

capabilities.name: Release Project Run
capabilities.description: Release a project run lease, transitioning the run to a terminal status (completed, interrupted, or released).

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Final status: completed, interrupted, or released.

parameters.name: evidence_json
parameters.description: Optional evidence JSON object to attach on release.

output.description: Released project run record with the requested terminal status and updated evidence.

capabilities.name: Add Project Run Evidence
capabilities.description: Append or replace structured evidence on an active project run lease. Rejected when the run is completed or released.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for mutation event lineage.

parameters.name: evidence_json
parameters.description: Full evidence JSON object: implementationRunRefs, warningRecords, validationFindingRefs, commitSha, prUrl, linkedSpecIds.

output.description: Project run record with updated evidence and refreshed validation.

capabilities.name: List Project Runs
capabilities.description: List project runs in one scope, optionally filtered by status or work point.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter: suggested, claimed, active, interrupted, completed, or released.

output.description: Project run list envelope.

capabilities.name: Show Project Run
capabilities.description: Show one project run including claim metadata, evidence, and validation state.

output.description: Project run view with claim metadata, evidence, and validation state.

capabilities.name: Next Runnable Work Points
capabilities.description: List work points in a roadmap that have no blocking dependencies and no active lease, ordered by ordering then id.

parameters.name: roadmap_id
parameters.description: Roadmap identifier to scan for runnable work points.

output.description: Runnable work point candidates with dependency titles and reasons.

capabilities.name: Work Point Graph
capabilities.description: Render the work-point graph for a roadmap: nodes with active lease and plan counts, edges from declared dependencies.

output.description: Work graph with nodes and edges for the requested roadmap.

constraints.description: SQLite planning state is authoritative; rendered markdown and JSON projections are derived outputs only.
Roadmap authoring must always link each roadmap to an existing goal.

triggers.description: When durable roadmap authoring should happen through Elegy's planning authority.
When an agent needs the dedicated planning authority rather than ad hoc markdown only.
When a planning entity should be projected to markdown or JSON for sharing or inspection.
When planning state should be checked for deterministic warnings and errors.
When reasoning or design decisions should be captured alongside planning entities.
When an LLM needs full context about a planning entity including related insights and tags.
When finding planning entities by tag correlation.
